children.text: each warehouse operator licensed under this chapter;
each person that has obtained an approval to engage in an activity under this chapter; and
each person claiming an interest in an agricultural product by means of a document or receipt subject to this chapter.

children.heading: Covered agricultural products
children.label: b Covered agricultural products
children.text: The Secretary shall specify, after an opportunity for notice and comment, those agricultural products for which a warehouse license may be issued under this chapter.

children.heading: Investigations
children.label: c Investigations
children.text: The Secretary may investigate the storing, warehousing, classifying according to grade and otherwise, weighing, and certifying of agricultural products.

children.heading: Inspections
children.label: d Inspections
children.text: The Secretary may inspect or cause to be inspected any person or warehouse licensed under this chapter and any warehouse for which a license is applied for under this chapter.

children.heading: Suitability for storage
children.label: e Suitability for storage
children.text: The Secretary may determine whether a licensed warehouse, or a warehouse for which a license is applied for under this chapter, is suitable for the proper storage of the agricultural product or products stored or proposed for storage in the warehouse.

children.heading: Classification
children.label: f Classification
children.text: The Secretary may classify a licensed warehouse, or a warehouse for which a license is applied for under this chapter, in accordance with the ownership, location, surroundings, capacity, conditions, and other qualities of the warehouse and as to the kinds of licenses issued or that may be issued for the warehouse under this chapter.

children.heading: Warehouse operator’s duties
children.label: g Warehouse operator’s duties
children.text: Subject to the other provisions of this chapter, the Secretary may prescribe the duties of a warehouse operator operating a warehouse licensed under this chapter with respect to the warehouse operator’s care of and responsibility for agricultural products stored or handled by the warehouse operator.

children.heading: Regulations governing electronic systems
children.label: 1 Regulations governing electronic systems
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), the Secretary may promulgate regulations governing one or more electronic systems under which electronic receipts may be issued and transferred and other electronic documents relating to the shipment, payment, and financing of the sale of agricultural products may be issued or transferred.

children.label: A
children.text: one or more central filing systems for the filing of financing statements or the filing of the notice of financing statements; or

children.label: B
children.text: rules to determine security interests of persons affected by this chapter.
any person that is engaged in the business of storing an agricultural product that is subject to this chapter;
any State agency that regulates the storage of an agricultural product by such a person; or
any commodity exchange with regulatory authority over the storage of agricultural products that are subject to this chapter.

children.heading: Licenses for operation of warehouses
children.label: j Licenses for operation of warehouses

children.text: the Secretary determines that the warehouse is suitable for the proper storage of the agricultural product or products stored or proposed for storage in the warehouse; and
the warehouse operator agrees, as a condition of the license, to comply with this chapter (including regulations promulgated under this chapter).

children.label: A
children.text: to inspect any agricultural product stored or handled in a warehouse subject to this chapter;

children.label: B
children.text: to sample such an agricultural product;

children.label: C
children.text: to classify such an agricultural product according to condition, grade, or other class and certify the condition, grade, or other class of the agricultural product; or

children.label: D
children.text: to weigh such an agricultural product and certify the weight of the agricultural product.

children.heading: Condition
children.label: 2 Condition
children.text: As a condition of a license issued under paragraph (1), the licensee shall agree to comply with this chapter (including regulations promulgated under this chapter).

children.heading: Examination of books, records, papers, and accounts
children.label: l Examination of books, records, papers, and accounts

children.text: a warehouse operator operating a warehouse licensed under this chapter;
a person operating a system for the electronic recording and transfer of receipts and other documents authorized by the Secretary; or
any other person issuing receipts or electronic documents authorized by the Secretary under this chapter.
cooperate with officers and employees of a State who administer or enforce State laws relating to warehouses, warehouse operators, weighers, graders, inspectors, samplers, or classifiers; and
enter into cooperative agreements with States to perform activities authorized under this chapter.
